pages.text: $(l)Tablets$() are the thematic keys. $(l)Idols$() are the forged ritual components. Neither one is the final weapon on its own.
Tablet of Stillness: tied to Sloth and used to awaken the blank form of the Sloth weapon.
Tablet of Exaltation: tied to Pride and used to awaken Vanity's Edge.
Tablet of Coveting: tied to Envy and used to awaken Covetfang.
Two of the three idol recipes. If your recipe file names differ from these IDs, update the page recipe IDs to match.
pages.title: Idol Recipes

pages.text: The Hollow Fang Idol is the Envy weapon's forged ritual component.
